title: Institution
description: A user-created institution within an industry inside a country in a world. Captures identity, governance, capital structure, staff hierarchy with reporting lines, industry-specific operational shapes, parent-subsidiary relationships, compensation structure, and reputation. Per V0-PLAN §5.0 — depth means staff hierarchy is real, not a flat members[] list. v0.1.1 amends capital per DECISION-CURRENCY-MODEL.md: introduces initial_treasury_coin (V0 primary, required) + current_treasury_coin (readOnly from ledger); recasts pol counterparts as V0.5+ real-money rail; same Coin-first rename applied to debt_facilities.principal_coin and share_capital_coin.

country.description: Foreign key to country.schema.json instance. Institution operates under that country's laws.

world.description: Foreign key to world.schema.json (derivable from country, but explicit for query convenience).

type.description: Must be one of the institution_types declared by the industry (e.g. football allows 'club', 'league', 'federation', 'agency', 'media_outlet', 'academy').

headquarters_lot_id.description: Foreign key to a lot.schema.json instance.

narrative_brief.description: Editorial framing — what makes this institution distinctive. The Hartwell FC 'Market town. Three managers in two seasons. Patient board, impatient supporters' trust.' shape.

decision_threshold.description: Voting threshold for governance decisions. 0.51 = simple majority.

board.description: Board members (named characters). Required for shareholder_board, trust_owned, state_owned structures.

holder_id.description: Character or institution ID. Holders can be either.

capital.description: Per DECISION-CURRENCY-MODEL.md: V0 ships Coin only. POL is V0.5+. Coin and POL never convert. Treasury balance fields (current_*) are readOnly views from the ledger per DECISION-LEDGER.md §10.2.

initial_treasury_coin.description: Capital at founding, in Coin (V0 primary currency). Was initial_treasury_pol pre-v0.1.1; renamed when Coin became V0 primary per DECISION-CURRENCY-MODEL.md.

current_treasury_coin.description: Snapshot of current Coin treasury — substrate-tracked, derived from the polis/sim ledger. Never authored.

initial_treasury_pol.description: V0.5+ POL capital injection (wrapped USDC). Stays 0 at V0 when POL rail is dormant. When non-zero, requires KYC + chain settlement per DECISION-CHAIN.md.

current_treasury_pol.description: V0.5+ on-chain POL balance. Stays 0 at V0. Derived from the POL ledger after chain confirmation via the on-chain sweep pattern (DECISION-LEDGER.md §9).

debt_facilities.description: Inter-institution loans. At V0 all loans are Coin-denominated; principal_coin is required. principal_pol is V0.5+ when POL exists.

principal_coin.description: Loan principal in Coin (V0). Was principal_pol pre-v0.1.1.

principal_pol.description: V0.5+ POL-denominated principal. Stays 0 at V0.

share_capital_coin.description: Equity capital denominated in Coin (V0). Was share_capital_pol pre-v0.1.1.

share_capital_pol.description: V0.5+ POL-denominated share capital. Stays 0 at V0.

staff.description: Staff hierarchy with reporting lines. NOT a flat members[] list (V0-PLAN §5.0 depth principle). Real organizations have reporting lines + departments + role descriptions.

reports_to_role_id.description: Foreign key to another roles[].role_id. Null for top of hierarchy (e.g. CEO, Chairman). Must form a DAG (no cycles) — engine validates.

incumbent_character_id.description: Currently filled by this character; null if vacant.

departments.description: Optional department metadata (head_role_id, headcount targets, budget allocation).

members_by_role.description: Industry-specific members not in named roles[] (e.g. football: 25-player squad keyed by profession). Each member has a contract.

production_processes.description: Production cycles (per PRD §8.4 — for industries that produce goods). Validated by plausibility judge at declaration time. Most football institutions have none.

parent_institution_id.description: Foreign key — if this institution is a subsidiary of another. Null for top-of-tree.

subsidiaries.description: Foreign keys to other institution.schema.json instances owned by this one. Vertical integration per PRD §8.10.

public_score.description: Composite reputation 0-100. Substrate-tracked from market outcomes + LLM-driven press coverage.

smart_contract_address.description: On-chain ownership / share token contract. Deployed via approved factory only (PRD §5.2). Null for institutions with off-chain governance only.

industry_specific.description: Industry-specific operational fields. Defined per industry. Football clubs use this for {ground, capacity, kit_design, academy_ranking}. Banks use it for {tier1_capital, deposit_insurance, lending_book}. Music labels use it for {roster_size, catalog, distribution}. Schema-validated against industry.schema.json's domain extension at validate time.

founder_royalty.description: BOUND: institution-level founder royalty capped at 0.5% (much lower than country/industry — institutions are smaller scope). Default 0 (most institutions have no royalty).

min_capital_pol.description: Industry-defined minimum (per industry.institution_types[].min_capital_pol). Institution config inherits from industry.
